emails.subject: Response to Bridgeline Issue Memo
emails.body: Response to Bridgeline Issue Memo Attached is a draft of the response to Bridgeline issue memo concerning various issues in the Contribution Agreement. Please review and provide any comments you may have. Thanks.

emails.subject: Response to Bridgeline Issue Memo
emails.body: Response to Bridgeline Issue Memo Attached is a draft of the response to Bridgeline issue memo concerning various issues in the Contribution Agreement. Please review and provide any comments you may have. Thanks.

emails.subject: FW: Response to Bridgeline Issue Memo
emails.body: FW: Response to Bridgeline Issue Memo Please review the attached response to Bridgeline's memo claiming additional costs in respect of the Contribution Agreement. Please forward any comments/changes to Gerald. Lillian, please arrange a meeting next week with the above group to discuss before we send to Bridgeline. Thanks, Brian
